data.title: Standard Motor Products will report Q4 & FY 2025 earnings on Feb 26, 2026, for the period ended December 31, 2025.
data.description: On February 20, 2026, Standard Motor Products, Inc. (NYSE: SMP), a prominent automotive parts maker and supplier, announced plans to disclose its financial results for the three-month and twelve-month period concluding on December 31, 2025. The report is set to be released before the market opens on February 26, 2026.

data.title: KBRA study analyzes 455,000 loans worth $292.3 billion from 2010-2025 prime RMBS transactions, examining loan attributes' impact on credit outcomes.
data.description: In New York, credit rating agency KBRA has published a prime Residential Mortgage-Backed Securities (RMBS) default study. The study analyzes more than 455,000 loans totaling $292.3 billion in original balance from about 640 prime transactions issued from 2010 to 2025. The report delves into the performance dynamics of various loan attributes such as vintage, combined loan-to-value (CLTV) ratio, credit score, occupancy, loan purpose, product type, and borrower reserves. It investigates the influence of multiple risk factors on credit outcomes. Some notable findings from the study include:

data.title: Nucor promotes Jack Sullivan to CFO, Treasurer, and EVP. Effective Feb 20, 2026. #Nucor #NYSE #CFO
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina on February 20, 2026, Nucor Corporation (NYSE: NUE) revealed the promotion of John L. "Jack" Sullivan. Formerly serving as Vice President, Treasurer, and General Manager of Investor Relations, Sullivan will now take on the roles of Chief Financial Officer, Treasurer, and Executive Vice President. This strategic move showcases Nucor's commitment to internal talent development and positions Sullivan to take on broader financial responsibilities within the company.
Base ends relationship with optimism, leading to 5% drop in stock prices. Investors cautious.

data.title: ParaZero receives another order of DefendAir C-UAS system from Israeli defense, building trust in innovative interception tech.
data.description: On February 20, 2026, in Kfar Saba, Israel, ParaZero Technologies Ltd. (Nasdaq: PRZO), a leading aerospace defense company specializing in autonomous solutions for both manned and unmanned aerial systems (UAS), revealed that they have secured a new order from another division within an Israeli defense organization for their DefendAir™ multi-layered Counter-UAS (C-UAS) solution. This fresh order follows a previous successful deployment earlier in the year with the same defense entity, showcasing a burgeoning reliance on ParaZero’s cutting-edge net-based interception technology.

data.title: BitGo and Figure complete first tokenized equity trades on Figure's ATS, merging regulated infrastructure for blockchain-native equities.
data.description: BitGo Holdings, Inc. and Figure Technology Solutions, Inc. have successfully conducted the first blockchain-native equity trades through their integrated infrastructure on Figure's Alternative Trading System. This collaboration marks a significant achievement in the digital asset space. BitGo, trading under the ticker symbol BTGO on the NYSE, utilized BitGo Bank & Trust, N.A.'s regulated platform to facilitate the trades. This development highlights the growing importance of blockchain technology in traditional financial markets.

data.title: LiveRamp partners with Scowtt, using predictive AI to optimize ads. Delivering superior outcomes for marketers.
data.description: In San Francisco, LiveRamp (NYSE: RAMP) revealed a collaboration with Scowtt, an AI-driven advertising optimization platform, to merge Scowtt's predictive AI models into LiveRamp's data collaboration platform. This unique partnership aims to provide unparalleled value-based performance optimization to prominent platforms and programmatic destinations. The integration promises to enhance outcomes for marketers by leveraging AI technology. LiveRamp and Scowtt's joint effort is set to revolutionize the advertising industry with innovative solutions for marketers.

data.title: Intrepid Potash (NYSE: IPI) to release Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on March 4, 2026, with a conference call on March 5, 2026, at 12pm ET. Dial 1 (800) 715-9871 to listen.
data.description: Intrepid Potash, Inc. (NYSE: IPI) is set to unveil its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on Wednesday, March 4, 2026, post-market closure. The company has scheduled a conference call for Thursday, March 5, 2026, at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time to delve into the results, operational activities, financial updates, and respond to investor queries. Those interested can tune in to the call through the toll-free dial-in number 1 (800) 715-9871.

data.title: Stablecoin A7A5 expanding network for sanctioned firms; accused of evading sanctions, creating separate financial system.
data.description: The stablecoin ecosystem, known as A7A5, is under scrutiny for allegedly evading sanctions and has been accused of establishing a financial network that bypasses sanctions, as per analysts.

data.title: Gemini Space Station (GEMI) shares drop 13% after surprise pullback and executive departures following IPO.
data.description: Investors who incurred losses in Gemini Space Station (NASDAQ: GEMI) are advised to reach out to Hagens Berman following the company's disclosure on February 17, 2026. Share prices plummeted by approximately 13% after the surprising revelation of three senior executive departures.

data.title: Baltic Horizon Fund held a webinar on Feb 20, 2026, presenting Q4 2025 results and new unit issuance.
data.description: Baltic Horizon conducted an investor webinar on February 20, 2026, during which fund manager Tarmo Karotam presented the Q4 2025 results and announced the issuance of new units.

data.title: VCI Global forms ROBODAX to unify robotics automation and digital infrastructure, boosting scalability in AI deployment.
data.description: Strategic Platform Initiative sets company up for scalable commercial deployment within AI-driven physical-to-digital ecosystem. This move aims to capitalize on the growing trend towards digital transformation. The initiative places the company in a strong position to expand its market presence and leverage the advantages of AI technology. The focus is on achieving scalability and driving growth within the digital ecosystem. Key metrics include cost efficiency, operational effectiveness, and enhanced customer experience. With this strategic move, the company is geared towards seizing opportunities in the AI space.

data.title: Meta plans to invest $65 million to support AI-friendly state politicians, starting in Texas and Illinois. This is Meta's largest election-related expenditure to date. They are launching two new super PACs to counteract potential legislative threats to AI development.
data.description: Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META) is set to invest $65 million in 2026 to endorse state politicians who advocate for the artificial intelligence (AI) sector. The campaign will debut in Texas and Illinois this week, marking the company's most substantial election-related spending so far. With potential regulatory challenges looming over the AI industry, Meta is ramping up its political engagement to safeguard against any laws that may impede AI progress. To bolster this effort, Meta has introduced two new super political action committees (PACs): Forge the Future Project and Making Our Tomorrow, which will back Republicans and Democrats, respectively. These PACs complement the two existing ones, bringing the total initial budget to $65 million.
